name: R&D Cycle: {{.cycle_name}}
description: Autonomous R&D cycle scanning MCP ecosystem changes since {{.since_date}}, planning roadmap updates, implementing changes, and verifying quality.
completion: All planned work items are implemented, tests pass, and roadmap is updated.

tasks.description: Run rdcycle_scan to check ecosystem activity for repos since {{.since_date}}. Store the scan artifact.
Run rdcycle_plan with scan results and roadmap at {{.roadmap_path}} to identify gaps and ready work items.

Create new Go source files for the planned work. MANDATORY STEPS: 1) read_file on a similar existing package to use as a template (e.g. memory/memory.go for interfaces+store, or handler/handler.go for typed handlers), 2) call write_file with path and complete Go source code in the content field to create each .go file, 3) call write_file to create _test.go files. If a directory is empty or does not exist, you must CREATE the files — they will not appear by listing. Every iteration in this phase MUST include at least one write_file call.
Run rdcycle_verify to execute 'go build ./...' then 'go test ./... -count=1 -short'. If it fails, use read_file and write_file to fix issues, then re-verify.
Record improvement notes for this cycle using rdcycle_notes: what worked, what failed, wasted iterations, cost, and suggestions for next cycle.
Run rdcycle_report to generate RESEARCH-*.md from scan data. Run rdcycle_commit to save changes.
Run rdcycle_schedule to write the next cycle's spec with updated since_date.
